prompt_rules: Use literal physical descriptions only, no metaphors or creative adjectives
Always start with character identity block
Describe only what is visible and audible
Never include any text/words/characters in the scene description
Specify camera angle and movement explicitly
pixverse.negative_prompt_default: text, words, letters, subtitles, captions, watermark, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, duplicate characters

prompt_rules: 只描述可见和可听的内容
场景中绝不包含任何文字
明确指定镜头角度和运动
Always include full character identity block
Specify exact pose and expression needed
Include background description matching the shot
Use consistent style keywords across all generations
liblib.style_keywords: cartoon style, 3D render, Pixar style, soft lighting, vibrant colors
